crypto-oversold-bounce.rationale: BOOST 1.0→2.0×: RSI 8.2 BTC i 13.5 ETH to dokładnie warunki dla których ta strategia istnieje. ETH RSI trend 4.3→7.9→13.5 przez 3 doby = 3-bar stabilization pattern spełniony. Gdyby pipeline działał, ta strategia powinna strzelać TERAZ z maksymalnym rozmiarem. NOW.rationale: ADDED 2026-05-21 v3.9.1 — Senior PM agent diversification recommendation. ServiceNow: cloud workflow leader, 25%+ revenue growth, $11B+ ARR, enterprise stickiness, lower beta than NVDA/AMD/SMH (correlated_bucket ai_nasdaq_semis already at 80% > 65% cap). New software_quality bucket opens RISK_ON/NEUTRAL allocation alongside semis without further concentrating AI semis exposure. Target size $15k (~15.6% equity at ~$925/share = 16 shares), SL -7%, TP +14%.

Re-enable only after (a) momentum confirmation filter is added (3 consec up days before breakout) AND backtest re-run shows positive P&L, OR (b) BTC enters confirmed sideways/uptrend regime.
